query: SELECT s.id, s.signatureText, s.signatureType, s.createdAt, sr.documentId, sr.documentTitle FROM signatures s JOIN signature_requests sr ON s.signatureRequestId = sr.id ORDER BY s.id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute SELECT s.id, s.signatureText, s.signatureType, s.createdAt, sr.documentId, sr.documentTitle FROM signatures s JOIN signature_requests sr ON s.signatureRequestId = sr.id ORDER BY s.id DESC LIMIT 5;
